title: Animal Matching Puzzle
description: Flip and match pairs of cute animals!

title: Bubble Pop
description: Pop floating bubbles to learn letters, numbers, and shapes!

title: Digital Coloring
description: Swipe to reveal beautiful, vibrant pre-colored scenes!

title: Peek-a-Boo
description: Tap the bouncy doors to find who is hiding behind!

title: Scratcher Card
description: Scratch away the metallic surface to find hidden animal scenes!

title: Ball Launch Physics
description: Launch the ball and watch it pop balloons with magnet assist!

title: Shape Sound Board
description: Tap giant colorful shapes to hear funny animal and instrument sounds!

title: Shape Sorter Puzzle
description: Match colored geometric shape pieces to their slot silhouettes!

title: Flashlight Finder
description: Move the flashlight beam in the dark to find hidden animals!
